sentences.target: J’ai une tonne de mails à traiter.
sentences.reading: /ʒe yn tɔn də mɛl a tʁete/

translations.fr: J’ai une tonne de mails à traiter.
translations.ipa: /ʒe yn tɔn də mɛl a tʁete/
translations.en: I have a ton of emails to deal with.
translations.es: Tengo un montón de correos que atender.
translations.de: Ich habe eine Menge E-Mails zu bearbeiten.
translations.it: Ho un sacco di email da gestire.
translations.zh-Hans: 我有一大堆邮件要处理。
translations.yue: 我有一大堆電郵要處理。
translations.ru: У меня куча писем, которые нужно разобрать.
translations.pt: Tenho um monte de e-mails para tratar.
translations.he: יש לי המון מיילים לטפל בהם.
translations.tr: Uğraşmam gereken bir sürü e-posta var.
translations.vi: Tôi có cả đống email phải xử lý.
translations.ar: لدي الكثير من رسائل البريد الإلكتروني لأتعامل معها.
translations.nl: Ik heb een heleboel e-mails om af te handelen.
translations.uk: У мене купа листів, з якими треба розібратися.
translations.hi: मुझे संभालने के लिए ढेर सारे ईमेल हैं.
translations.el: Έχω ένα σωρό μέιλ να διεκπεραιώσω.
translations.nb: Jeg har haugevis av e-poster å håndtere.
translations.id: Saya punya banyak email yang harus ditangani.
translations.sv: Jag har massor av mejl att ta hand om.
translations.ro: Am o grămadă de emailuri de rezolvat.
translations.da: Jeg har en masse e-mails, der skal håndteres.
translations.ja: 対処しなければならないメールが山ほどある。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun je elided to j’ attached to the finite verb ai (avoir); here avoir is used as the main predicate meaning ‘to have’.
Indefinite article agreeing in gender/number with the following noun.
Common noun used as a quantitative measure (‘a ton of …’), head of the measure phrase.
Preposition introducing the complement of the measure noun (content of the ‘tonne’).
Plural common noun; complement of the measure noun via de.
Preposition marking an infinitival modifier expressing purpose/necessity.
Infinitive verb; non-finite clause modifying mails (‘to process’).

sentences.target: Tu as une tonne d’oignons dans le frigo.
sentences.reading: /ty a yn tɔn dɔɲɔ̃ dɑ̃ lə fʁiɡo/

translations.fr: Tu as une tonne d’oignons dans le frigo.
translations.ipa: /ty a yn tɔn dɔɲɔ̃ dɑ̃ lə fʁiɡo/
translations.en: You have a ton of onions in the fridge.
translations.es: Tienes un montón de cebollas en la nevera.
translations.de: Du hast eine Menge Zwiebeln im Kühlschrank.
translations.it: Hai un sacco di cipolle nel frigo.
translations.ru: В холодильнике у тебя куча лука.
translations.pt: Você tem um monte de cebolas na geladeira.
translations.vi: Trong tủ lạnh có cả đống hành tây.
translations.ar: لديك الكثير من البصل في الثلاجة.
translations.nl: Je hebt een heleboel uien in de koelkast.
translations.uk: У тебе в холодильнику купа цибулі.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे फ्रिज में बहुत सारे प्याज़ हैं.
translations.el: Έχεις ένα σωρό κρεμμύδια στο ψυγείο.
translations.nb: Du har haugevis av løk i kjøleskapet.
translations.id: Kamu punya banyak bawang bombai di kulkas.
translations.sv: Du har massor av lök i kylen.
translations.ro: Ai o grămadă de ceapă în frigider.
translations.da: Du har en masse løg i køleskabet.
translations.ja: 冷蔵庫に玉ねぎが山ほどある。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun.
Finite main verb (2nd person singular present) meaning ‘have’.
Indefinite article introducing the measure noun.
Quantitative common noun (‘a ton of …’), head of the measure phrase.
Elision of de before vowel (d’) attached to the plural noun oignons; head noun is the complement of the measure noun.
Locative preposition introducing a prepositional phrase.
Definite article agreeing with frigo.
Common noun; object of the preposition dans.

sentences.target: Il y a une tonne de gens dehors.
sentences.reading: /il i a yn tɔn də ʒɑ̃ dəɔʁ/

translations.fr: Il y a une tonne de gens dehors.
translations.ipa: /il i a yn tɔn də ʒɑ̃ dəɔʁ/
translations.en: There are a ton of people outside.
translations.es: Hay un montón de gente afuera.
translations.it: Fuori c’è un sacco di gente.
translations.pt: Tem um monte de gente lá fora.
translations.vi: Bên ngoài có cả đống người.
translations.ar: في الخارج يوجد الكثير من الناس.
translations.nl: Er zijn buiten een heleboel mensen.
translations.nb: Det er haugevis av folk ute.
translations.sv: Det är massor av folk ute.
translations.ro: Afară sunt o grămadă de oameni.
translations.da: Der er en masse mennesker udenfor.

tokens.explanation: Expletive subject pronoun in the existential expression il y a.
Adverbial clitic pronoun forming part of the fixed expression il y a.
Finite verb (3rd person singular of avoir) in the existential construction ‘there is/are’.
Indefinite article introducing the measure noun.
Quantitative noun serving as head of a measure phrase.
Preposition introducing the content of the measure (‘of people’).
Plural noun; complement of the measure noun via de.
Adverb of place indicating location.

sentences.target: Nous gérons une tonne de papiers aujourd’hui.
sentences.reading: /nu ʒeʁɔ̃ yn tɔn də papje oʒuʁdɥi/

translations.fr: Nous gérons une tonne de papiers aujourd’hui.
translations.ipa: /nu ʒeʁɔ̃ yn tɔn də papje oʒuʁdɥi/
translations.en: We’re handling a ton of paperwork today.
translations.es: Hoy estamos lidiando con un montón de papeleo.
translations.de: Heute bearbeiten wir eine Menge Papierkram.
translations.it: Oggi stiamo gestendo un sacco di pratiche.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天要处理一大堆文件。
translations.yue: 我哋今日要處理一大堆文件。
translations.pt: Hoje estamos lidando com um monte de papelada.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi đang xử lý cả đống giấy tờ.
translations.ar: اليوم نتعامل مع الكثير من الأوراق.
translations.nl: Vandaag verwerken we een heleboel papierwerk.
translations.hi: आज हम ढेर सारा कागजी काम निपटा रहे हैं.
translations.nb: I dag håndterer vi haugevis av papirer.
translations.id: Hari ini kami menangani banyak berkas.
translations.sv: Idag hanterar vi massor av pappersarbete.
translations.ro: Astăzi gestionăm o grămadă de hârtii.
translations.da: I dag håndterer vi en masse papirarbejde.
translations.ja: 今日は大量の書類を処理している。

tokens.explanation: First-person plural subject pronoun.
Finite main verb (1st person plural present).
Indefinite article introducing the measure noun.
Quantitative noun heading a measure phrase.
Preposition introducing the complement of the measure.
Plural common noun; complement of the measure noun via de.
Temporal adverb specifying when the action takes place.
